input.title: Sprint planning notes

input.title: Launch checklist - portfolio v2
input.content: Need to finalize the portfolio redesign before applying to internships. Tasks: migrate from Framer to Next.js, write 3 case studies, set up analytics, optimize images, get feedback from 2 designers, ship by end of week.

output.summary: A pre-launch checklist for the portfolio v2 redesign, targeting completion before internship applications. Covers technical migration, content creation, performance optimization, and a peer review step.
